CreateDedicatedChannelRouteRules.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateDedicatedChannelRouteRules.ipVersion: IP protocol version, valid values: [4 \| 6], default is 4
CreateDedicatedChannelRouteRules.nexthopType: Next hop type, valid values: ["etGateway" \| "etChannel"], representing dedicated line gateway and dedicated line channel respectively
